title: Smart Tool Switcher
description: Your tools finally have a brain bcs i dont. Automatically switches to the best tool or weapon.
body:
# ⚡ Smart Tool Switcher

Your tools finally have a brain.

Smart Tool Switcher automatically selects the best tool or weapon for what you're doing — instantly and intelligently.

No more mining dirt with a pickaxe.  
No more fighting with a shovel.  
No more wasting time switching tools manually.

---

## 🎮 Features

- ⛏️ Auto tool switching (mining)
- ⚔️ Auto weapon switching (combat)
- ⚡ Smart decision system
- 🧍 Sneak to disable temporarily
- ⏱️ Configurable switch delay
- 🧠 Only switch if actually better
- Keybind to open the settings menu (configurable in Controls)
---

## 🧠 What makes it different?

This isn't just a simple auto-switch mod.

✔ Smart selection logic  
- Chooses tools based on **harvest level, speed, and enchantments**  
- Always prefers tools that can actually break the block  
- Picks the fastest valid option — not just the closest one  

✔ Combat-aware  
- Automatically switches to the best weapon in fights  
- Considers damage and enchantments (like Sharpness)

✔ Clean and controllable  
- Simple in-game settings menu  
- Adjustable delay to prevent flickering  
- Sneak to pause switching when needed  

✔ No stupid switches  
- Won’t switch to worse tools  
- Won’t pick tools that can’t mine the block  

---

## 💡 Why use this?

Because switching tools manually is annoying.

This mod removes that friction — without being dumb about it.

---

## ⚡

**Never mine wrong again.**
